rationale: Postcondition `det_send_single_cmessage_equal` requires concrete equality on `post1_self_.{receive,send}_state.epmap == post2_self_...epmap`, where `epmap: HashMap<V>` is declared `#[verifier(external_body)] pub struct HashMap<V>` with only an `uninterp spec fn view(self) -> Map<AbstractEndPoint, V>`. The only spec available from `CSingleDelivery::send_single_cmessage` is `SingleDelivery::send_single_message(pre@, post@, m@, dst@, sm, params)`, which constrains views only. View equality on `Map<..., ...>` cannot be lifted to concrete equality on opaque `HashMap<V>` (no Structural derive, no axiom). Tried: (a) full proof block of nested implications climbing from view equality to `epmap@.map_values(...)` extensional equality (previous attempt) -- fails on outer postcondition; (b) direct `assert(post1.receive_state.epmap == post2.receive_state.epmap)` -- assertion fails; (c) extensional `=~=` on epmap -- also fails because HashMap has no extensionality axiom.
